name: Apple Tart
recipeInstructions: Preheat oven to 400°F. In a medium-sized mixing bowl, combine egg, sugar, and milk. In a separate bowl, mix flour, baking powder, salt, and spices. Gradually stir the dry ingredients into the wet mixture until a soft dough forms that can be handled. Press the dough evenly into a 9-inch or 10-inch nonstick cake pan, covering the bottom and sides. Peel and slice the apples. Arrange the slices in overlapping layers. Mix brown sugar, milk, and cinnamon, then drizzle over the apples. Bake for 20 minutes. Serve warm. For variety, substitute any quick-cooking fresh fruit.
